mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, biz_type, biz_id, receiver_type, receiver_ref_id, title, content, channel, status, scheduled_at, sent_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM notification_message WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_message ( tenant_id, biz_type, biz_id, receiver_type, receiver_ref_id, title, content, channel, status, scheduled_at, sent_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{receiverType}, #{receiverRefId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{channel}, #{status}, #{scheduledAt}, #{sentAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_message SET biz_type = #{bizType}, biz_id = #{bizId}, receiver_type = #{receiverType}, receiver_ref_id = #{receiverRefId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, channel = #{channel}, status = #{status}, scheduled_at = #{scheduledAt}, sent_at = #{sentAt} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
